3.sql: SELECT objid, skredtype, sikkerhetsklasse, ST_Area(omrade) AS area_sqm FROM snoskredaktsomhetskart_ca17d51d1f444cbb8162d762cf551cbe.potensieltskredfareomr WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer = '1806'));

1.description: get Narvik municipality number and geometry

2.description: get all buildings in the municipality (filter by kommunenummer from step 1)

3.description: get snow-avalanche hazard polygons that intersect the municipality extent (use geometry from step 1 to reduce national layer)

4.description: find buildings that intersect the reduced hazard polygons

5.description: collapse to one row per building (count per bygningid) to remove duplicates
